_meta.description: Machine-readable project snapshot. Update alongside proj-progress.txt after major milestones.

current_goal: All 6 build-to-launch phases implemented. Site update and W3C interchange remain.
completed: Agent workflow artifacts added
Workspace now builds, tests, type-checks, and lints
CLI init, validate, and build commands implemented
Core accessibility validation and CSS/JSON export implemented
Launch strategy and free-tier monetization framing documented
Canonical preset source moved into @fetchtype/core
Alias resolution and named theme support implemented
GitHub validation action and workflow added
Google Fonts and self-hosted font reference helpers added
Packaged CLI tarball and package-spec GitHub Action path verified outside the repo layout
CLI build command now supports format-scoped artifact output for external CI usage
CLI validate now emits GitHub workflow annotations and step-summary markdown for PR review flows
Launch docs now define an icon-led anti-bento visual direction for future UI and marketing work
Static launch site and root Vercel deployment config added for fetchtype.com
Homepage rewritten: problem-first copy, specific WCAG thresholds, visual briefs for assets
Docs page rewritten: stripped internal ops, added token format docs, validation rules, CI workflow
Build-to-launch roadmap created with 6 phases from validator strengthening through agent integration
HANDOVER.md rewritten with tone guidelines, file map, feature additions F019–F032, and session protocol
Phase 1: 7 new validation rules, computed type scale, 4 presets (editorial/dashboard/ecommerce/docs), --preset flag
Phase 2: Typography modes (display/interface/reading/mono) in schema, mode-aware CSS and validation
Phase 3: Tailwind config exporter, shadcn CSS exporter, hex-to-HSL conversion
Phase 4: HTML report generator (--report), preview dev server (fetchtype preview) with file watching
Phase 5: Google Fonts catalog (31 fonts), font suggestion engine, font loading validation (fallbacks/payload/availability)
Phase 6: MCP server with 5 tools via @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, natural language init (--prompt) with rule-based parsing
F018: W3C Design Tokens $value import/export with CLI import command and build --format w3c
Publish fetchtype to npm (renamed from @fetchtype/cli)
next: Update site HTML to reflect Phase 1-6 capabilities (presets, modes, exporters, preview, font intelligence, agent integration)
